query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A wide coastal view features a calm sea stretching toward a distant horizon beneath an expansive sky dominated by massive, billowing cumulus clouds, with two birds in flight near the cloud base.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A wide coastal view features a calm sea stretching toward a distant horizon beneath an expansive sky dominated by massive, billowing cumulus clouds, with two birds in flight near the cloud base. The image is rendered with desaturated, washed-out monotone tints and low vibrancy that evoke a sense of melancholy and exhaustion.
